name: Dewlen Table Lamp - 24 Inch Height - TBL4421 - Brown/White - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegant Dewlen lamp, a perfect blend of style and practicality. Crafted from durable resin, this 24-inch table lamp combines natural brown and white hues to create a striking look that complements any room decor. Its graceful design and smooth finish make it an ideal addition to your bedside table or living room. This lamp not only enhances illumination but also serves as a refined decorative piece. Whether used for ambiance or reading, Dewlen adds a touch of charm and sophistication to your home. Upgrade your environment with simplicity and flair, bringing warmth and style to every corner.
